Sornita Eltern [ Wizard Spells ]  

Spells: Wizard
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded July 9th, 2017 by Gidono

  • This mob spawns at -1108, -233, +83 top floor of the library.
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): Yes

You say, 'Hail, Sornita Eltern'

Sornita Eltern says 'Greetings, ______! Please be do not speak too loudly while inside the library. If you need anything special, feel free to ask me. I am a member of the Crimson Hands and my specialty is divination. In my research I have stumbled across many [rare tomes].'

You say, 'What rare tomes?'

Sornita Eltern says 'Why, just yesterday I stumbled upon what I believe to be an excerpt from Miragul's own treatise on the origin of the creatures known as scarecrows. Such a work is heresy and would be destroyed if the High Council knew of its existence so I have been tight-lipped about my discovery. If you would like to see it, I will show it to you, for a nominal donation of 20 gold pieces.'

If you give her 20 gold or the equivalent, e.g., 2 platinum:

Sornita Eltern says 'Oh, yes. Very good friend. Here is the document I mentioned. It would seem to be part of a larger body of work, but this page describes a Teir'Dal who it seems was instrumental in creating the head of the very first scarecrow. You may keep that as it is merely a magical duplicate of the original document which I have carefully hidden.' You gain experience!!

You receive a Torn Parchment, to be used on the right step of the Rogue Epic 1.5: Fatestealer.

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2020-09-12 14:17:08.

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2020-09-12 14:23:17

Goods sold (9):
Cloudy Stone of Veeshan [Dragons of Norrath GH Portal Item] 73pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Spell: Conflagration 28pp 1gp 9sp
Spell: Diamondskin 21pp 3gp 4sp
Spell: Elemental Armor 23pp 1gp 8sp 6cp
Spell: Force Strike 23pp 3gp 8sp 3cp
Spell: Frost Storm 23pp 1gp 9sp
Spell: Lightning Shock 15pp 3gp 9sp 5cp
Spell: Markar's Clash 39pp 7gp 1sp 3cp
Spell: Rend 39pp 6gp 1sp
Items Given:
Torn Parchment [Copy of Miragul's Scarecrow Research]

Known Habitats:
  Erudin
Quests:
  Rogue Epic 1.5: Fatestealer

Report a correction

Sornita is 50

2,467 posts
No new items, adding prices:

[Tue Jan 11 16:07:51 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 73 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Cloudy Stone of Veeshan.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:07:52 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Conflagration.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:07:53 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Diamondskin.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:07:53 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Elemental Armor.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:07:54 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Force Strike.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:07:55 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Frost Storm.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:07:55 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 8 platinum 3 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Lightning Shock.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:07:56 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Markar`s Clash.'
[Tue Jan 11 16:07:57 2011] Sornita Eltern tells you, 'That'll be 10 platinum 4 gold 9 silver 9 copper per Spell: Rend.'

Location

# Dec 14 2007 at 11:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591951703521
26 posts
She is in the first zone of Erudin when you zone in with the spell merchants on the top floor, loc -1108, -233. The outside of the building has written on it Erudin City Library.
▲ Page top
Location of Sornita
QuoteReply
# Mar 16 2002 at 2:49 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Note to Wizards... this NPC is NOT in our guild. She's in the tower in the first erudin zone, where summoning spells are sold and part of the Stein of Moggok quest is done, on the top floor.
